title: GATE-4-FIX-V2 inbox repair
objective:
Run script:
"""
NL = "\n"
p = Path('governance/deno_webhook.js')
text = p.read_text(encoding='utf-8')
text = text.replace('Версия: v4.9 | BEM-487', 'Версия: v4.10 | GATE-4-FIX-V2')
text = text.replace('version: "4.9"', 'version: "4.10"')
start = text.find('const curatorComment = `@curator')
end_marker = 'return new Response("OK"); } return corsJson({ ok: false, error: "Not Found" }, 404); });'
end = text.find(end_marker, start)
if start < 0 or end < 0:
    raise Exception('telegram handler anchor not found')
new_block = 'const inboxPath = "governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl"; const inboxFd = await getFileContents(pat, inboxPath); let inboxRaw = ""; const inboxSha = inboxFd?.sha; if (inboxFd?.content) { inboxRaw = decodeURIComponent(escape(atob(inboxFd.content.replace(/\\n/g, "")))); } const inboxRecord = { ts: new Date().toISOString(), type: "OPERATOR_TO_CURATOR", source: "telegram", dedupe_key: dedupeKey, chat_id: chatId, message_id: messageId, text }; const inboxNext = inboxRaw + JSON.stringify(inboxRecord) + "\\n"; const status = await updateFileContents(pat, inboxPath, inboxNext, `TELEGRAM-INBOX: append ${dedupeKey}`, inboxSha); if (status === 200 || status === 201) { await sendTelegram(token, chatId, `📨 *${now} UA* | Записано в inbox:\\n_${text.slice(0, 100)}_`); } else { await sendTelegram(token, chatId, `❌ *${now} UA* | Inbox write error (HTTP ${status})`); } '
text = text[:start] + new_block + text[end:]
p.write_text(text, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(p))
inbox = Path('governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl')
inbox.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
if not inbox.exists():
    inbox.write_text('', encoding='utf-8')
    changed_files.append(str(inbox))
queue_path = Path('governance/roadmap/ACTIVE_QUEUE.json')
if queue_path.exists():
    queue = json.loads(queue_path.read_text(encoding='utf-8'))
else:
    queue = {'version': 2, 'tasks': []}
if not any(t.get('id') == 'GATE-4-FIX-V2' for t in queue.get('tasks', [])):
    queue.setdefault('tasks', []).append({'id': 'GATE-4-FIX-V2', 'title': 'Telegram webhook writes to inbox.jsonl instead of GitHub issue comments', 'status': 'DONE_PENDING_SHA_RECORD', 'touch_workflows': False})
for task in queue.get('tasks', []):
    if task.get('id') == 'GATE-4-FIX-V2':
        task['status'] = 'DONE_PENDING_SHA_RECORD'
        task['changed'] = ['governance/deno_webhook.js', 'governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl']
        task['criteria'] = 'Telegram POST handler appends JSONL to governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl using updateFileContents and no longer calls postGitHubComment for operator messages'
queue['updated_at'] = '2026-06-04T16:20:00Z'
queue['queue_state'] = 'GATE4_FIX_V2_PENDING_SHA_RECORD'
queue['next_action'] = 'record GATE-4-FIX-V2 result, then deploy/test Telegram message receipt'
queue_path.write_text(json.dumps(queue, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(queue_path))
state = Path('governance/state/GATE4_FIX_V2_TELEGRAM_INBOX_PATCH.json')
state.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
state.write_text(json.dumps({'id':'GATE-4-FIX-V2','trace_id':'gate4_fix_v2_telegram_inbox_patch_repair','status':'completed','release_pass':False,'change':'Telegram webhook now appends operator messages to governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl via updateFileContents instead of GitHub issue comments','workflow_files_touched':False,'next':'record result and test Telegram receipt after Deno deploy'}, ensure_ascii=False, indent=2) + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(state))
report = Path('governance/reports/GATE4_FIX_V2_TELEGRAM_INBOX_PATCH.md')
report.parent.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)
report.write_text('# GATE-4-FIX-V2 | Telegram inbox file patch' + NL + 'Status: completed' + NL + 'Date: 2026-06-04' + NL + NL + 'Telegram POST handler now writes operator messages to `governance/telegram/inbox.jsonl` through `updateFileContents` instead of posting GitHub issue comments. This removes the issue dependency from the Telegram receipt path.' + NL + NL + 'Workflow lock respected. No `.github/workflows/*.yml` files touched.' + NL + NL + 'Next: record SHA and test Telegram receipt after Deno deploy.' + NL, encoding='utf-8')
changed_files.append(str(report))
"""No issue comments.
